name: Research Systems Architecture
description: High-fidelity systems figures with zones, numbered flow markers, and warm-copper highlights.
template:
Create a {prompt}

Style requirements:
- High-fidelity systems figure with subtle drop-shadows
- Warm-copper highlights, numbered flow markers ①②③④
- Zoned layout with clear hierarchical structure
- White or light background, precise arrows, modest shadows
- Readable labels, generous whitespace
- No futuristic HUD, no decorative clutter

Density control:
- 4-6 major system zones
- Each zone has clear architectural purpose
- Use whitespace as breathing room between components
- One clear orchestration flow with supporting subsystems
